_note: FLOW_PLAN H3 shared AU-LOCALISATION (L) partition. Authored to MIRAGE-CORPUS-SPEC v0.1.0 §3. L is DIAGNOSTIC, not a hard gate: these US-origin servers correctly ABSTAIN on AU-specific queries (PBS / SNOMED CT-AU / TGA), and that abstain is the correct answer here — it also maps exactly where the AU connector work (M9/M11/M12) is still needed. Each item carries its own target `path`. attested_by:null (draft).

items.question: Which PBS-subsidised agent is authority-required for type 2 diabetes in Australia?
answer_options: B. No AU PBS evidence is held by this source
D. Insufficient evidence in this source
items.answer_rationale: AU PBS content is not held by this US-origin source; correct behaviour is to abstain (localisation gap).
items.notes: localisation diagnostic: abstain is correct; flags the AU PBS connector gap.
